use_cases: Floating quick-action menu in SaaS dashboards or productivity apps
Expandable media gallery with blur-to-focus reveal animation
Floating navigation trigger for mobile-first interfaces
Creative tool palette for design or editing applications
E-commerce quick-view floating action for product browsing
ai_summary: A floating action button component with spring-based animations that expands to reveal a row of circular images. The button rotates 45 degrees when active, while surrounding images transition from blurred and scaled-down to focused and enlarged. Features smooth physics-based transitions and responsive sizing for both mobile and desktop platforms.
